requirement_topic.en: Uzbekistan O'zstandart Conformity Versus EAC Context
requirement_topic.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦O'zstandart符合性与EAC背景
requirement_topic.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦O'zstandart符合性與EAC背景

summary.en: Uzbekistan is not an EAEU member; it has observer status, so EAEU EAC conformity under TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage safety and TR CU 020/2011 EMC should not be assumed to be the Uzbekistan legal route. In-scope BESS electrical equipment, PCS, control cabinets, auxiliary power equipment, and other low-voltage hardware should be assessed through Uzbekistan's domestic O'zstandart conformity route for regulated electrical products, using O'z DSt national standards and applicable GOST / IEC-derived evidence. EAC certificates may be useful background evidence for a project or regional procurement file, but they do not replace O'zstandart requirements where those apply.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦不是EAEU成员，而是观察员；因此不应假定TR CU 004/2011低电压安全和TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容下的EAEU EAC符合性就是乌兹别克斯坦法定路径。落入范围的BESS电气设备、PCS、控制柜、辅助电源设备及其他低电压硬件，应通过乌兹别克斯坦本国O'zstandart受监管电气产品符合性路径评估，并使用O'z DSt国家标准及适用的GOST/IEC派生证据。EAC证书可作为项目或区域采购资料的背景证据，但不能在适用时替代O'zstandart要求。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦不是EAEU成員，而是觀察員；因此不應假定TR CU 004/2011低電壓安全和TR CU 020/2011電磁相容下的EAEU EAC符合性就是烏茲別克斯坦法定路徑。落入範圍的BESS電氣設備、PCS、控制櫃、輔助電源設備及其他低電壓硬體，應通過烏茲別克斯坦本國O'zstandart受監管電氣產品符合性路徑評估，並使用O'z DSt國家標準及適用的GOST/IEC派生證據。EAC證書可作為項目或區域採購資料的背景證據，但不能在適用時替代O'zstandart要求。

standards_or_laws: O'zstandart mandatory conformity certification for regulated electrical products
O'z DSt national standards and applicable GOST / IEC-derived electrical safety and EMC standards
EAEU observer status is contextual only; EAC/TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 are not assumed to be Uzbekistan legal market-access routes

summary.en: China BESS suppliers commonly hold GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 evidence for battery safety and performance, plus EMC or electrical-safety reports for PCS and cabinets. Some suppliers may also hold EAC certificates for Kazakhstan, Russia, or other EAEU markets. These reports can support technical comparison but do not by themselves create an Uzbekistan O'zstandart certificate of conformity or market-access right.
summary.zh: 中国BESS供应商通常持有GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023等电池安全和性能证据，以及PCS和机柜的电磁兼容或电气安全报告。部分供应商还可能持有面向哈萨克斯坦、俄罗斯或其他EAEU市场的EAC证书。这些报告可支持技术比对，但本身不能形成乌兹别克斯坦O'zstandart符合性证书或市场准入权利。
summary.zht: 中國BESS供應商通常持有GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023等電池安全和性能證據，以及PCS和機櫃的電磁相容或電氣安全報告。部分供應商還可能持有面向哈薩克斯坦、俄羅斯或其他EAEU市場的EAC證書。這些報告可支持技術比對，但本身不能形成烏茲別克斯坦O'zstandart符合性證書或市場准入權利。

standards_or_laws: China EMC and electrical-safety test reports for PCS / cabinets
EAC certificates for EAEU markets where separately held

gap.en: The main gap is legal route and document recognition. Exporters should classify the shipped BESS configuration under Uzbekistan rules, identify whether regulated electrical-product certification applies, engage an eligible O'zstandart-accredited conformity body or local applicant where required, prepare Uzbek or Russian technical files, map Chinese and any EAC evidence to O'z DSt / GOST / IEC requirements, and ensure markings and documents match the exact equipment placed on the Uzbekistan market.
gap.zh: 主要差距在法定路径和文件认可。出口商应按乌兹别克斯坦规则对实际出货BESS配置进行分类，确认受监管电气产品认证是否适用，在需要时委托O'zstandart认可的合格评定机构或当地申请人，准备乌兹别克语或俄语技术文件，将中国及任何EAC证据映射至O'z DSt/GOST/IEC要求，并确保产品标识和文件与投放乌兹别克斯坦市场的设备一致。
gap.zht: 主要差距在法定路徑和文件認可。出口商應按烏茲別克斯坦規則對實際出貨BESS配置進行分類，確認受監管電氣產品認證是否適用，在需要時委託O'zstandart認可的合格評定機構或當地申請人，準備烏茲別克語或俄語技術文件，將中國及任何EAC證據映射至O'z DSt/GOST/IEC要求，並確保產品標識和文件與投放烏茲別克斯坦市場的設備一致。

mandatory_status.target: O'zstandart conformity is mandatory where the BESS electrical equipment is within Uzbekistan regulated electrical-product scope; EAC is optional/contextual unless separately required by contract or another destination market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 44240-2024 where in scope; other China EMC and electrical-safety evidence depends on product and project scope

source.publisher: Agency for Technical Regulation (O'zstandart), Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat EAC as the Uzbekistan legal route. Chinese GB evidence and any EAC certificate should be mapped into the domestic O'zstandart / O'z DSt / GOST / IEC conformity file where Uzbekistan regulated-product certification applies.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将EAC视为乌兹别克斯坦法定路径。中国GB证据及任何EAC证书，在乌兹别克斯坦受监管产品认证适用时，应映射进本国O'zstandart / O'z DSt / GOST / IEC符合性文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將EAC視為烏茲別克斯坦法定路徑。中國GB證據及任何EAC證書，在烏茲別克斯坦受監管產品認證適用時，應映射進本國O'zstandart / O'z DSt / GOST / IEC符合性文件。
